name: anthropic-models
description: Anthropic Claude chat models (Messages API). Bring your own Anthropic API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Anthropic API Key
x-meta.help: Your Anthropic API key (console.anthropic.com). Leave empty to fall back to the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: Anthropic model id. Empty = newest from the app's built-in catalog.

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: Optional custom Anthropic-compatible base URL. Empty uses the Anthropic default.
